rawContent:
Tweet by @askOkara (Okara)
Author bio: the only CMO you need for growth and marketing.
Text: you don't need 500 blog posts to win at seo. 

you need 30-50 pages that match what your icp searches for:

> comparison pages 
> alternative pages 
> use case pages
> free tool pages
> one strong page per core keyword
> "how to" pages for problems you solve
> trust pages (pricing, about, case studies, docs)

okara finds the keywords and writes these pages for you
